name: Pilafi Me Garides (Rice Pilaf W/shrimp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the shrimp and place them in a large pot. Add enough water to cover. Add salt and whole onion and celery, and bring to a boil.
2. Cook for about 5 minutes. Remove the shrimp with a slotted spoon and reserve the liquid. Shell and devein the shrimp.
3. Heat the oil in a large pot.
4. Saute chopped onions until light golden. Add the shrimp, turning 2 or 3 times.
5. Add tomatoes (or tomato paste) to the pot.
6. Cook for about 5 more minutes, then remove the shrimp and set aside, keeping them warm.
7. Measure the liquid in which the shrimp were boiled. Allow 2 1/2 cups of liquid for each cup of rice.
8. Add the liquid to the pot with the tomato sauce. Bring to a boil and add the rice. Stir for the first few minutes to prevent sticking.
9. Cook about 12 to 15 minutes until the rice is tender but has not absorbed all of the liquid.
10. Add two-thirds of the shrimp back into the rice, mixing well. Turn off the heat.
11. Cover with a clean towel and cover the towel with the lid. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes until all liquid is absorbed.
12. Mold the rice into a pyramid shape.
13. Garnish with remaining shrimp. Serves 6-10.
